productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Formal Black Shoes
description: Formal dressing only gets better with these shiny black patent leather shoes from red tape. The tapered toe box and cutting edge look will complement all formal outfits. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Upper Patent leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Tapered toe for comfort and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Leather tongue Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Leather inner lining for breathable comfort Padded leather footed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfort Stitch detail on outer midsole for decoration Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured base for grip Raised heel for ergonomic comfort, grip and style shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
